mapper.select: SELECT q.id, q.content, q.resource_type AS resourceType, CAST(q.status AS SIGNED) AS status, q.view_count AS viewCount, q.follow_count AS followCount, COUNT(a.id) AS answerCount, IFNULL(u.username, '匿名用户') AS user, DATE_FORMAT(q.create_time, '%Y/%m/%d') AS time FROM osh_question_answer_question q LEFT JOIN osh_question_answer_answer a ON a.question_id = q.id AND a.status = 0 LEFT JOIN osh_user u ON u.id = q.user_id WHERE q.delete_flag = 0 AND q.status != 2 GROUP BY q.id, q.content, q.resource_type, q.status, q.view_count, q.follow_count, u.username, q.create_time ORDER BY (0.50 * IFNULL(q.follow_count, 0) + 0.30 * IFNULL(q.view_count, 0) + 0.20 * COUNT(a.id)) DESC, q.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
